_comment: DJR participant page settings. Participant Pages is the main CMS workflow. Text fields are seeded from the live DJR page so editors can revise before publishing. Create/manage albums in /albums.html, then paste Supabase album UUIDs here.
name: David J. Richards

hero.tagline: Eye to eye with the moment.

story.body: The images here show the full arc: practice in the studio, cold nights on the track, a long lens aimed at the next play, a family moment, a reflection in sunglasses, and the dream of seeing his own story treated like cinema.
story.title: A camera became David's way of stepping into the world.
story.quote: The dream. The hard work. The moment. The capture.
story.lead: DJR Photography is not a polished brand invented in a boardroom. It is a real person learning to look closely, move with purpose, and tell people, places, games, and family stories through the lens.

featured.body: David does not just take pictures from the edge of the action. He studies the field, waits for the face, the posture, the light, and the split second where a person becomes the story.
featured.title: The Sideline Becomes the Studio

about.body: David J. Richards is building his voice as a photographer one frame at a time. His work moves between sports, family, studio practice, creative experiments, and everyday details. The common thread is attention: looking long enough to notice the thing other people might miss.
about.title: Not just a gallery. A point of view.

creative.body: The AI poster and press-pass portrait are not presented as documentary photography. They are part of the dream language around David's work: what it feels like when persistence, imagination, and a camera start opening doors.
creative.title: Based on a true story of perseverance and a camera.

cta.title: Help David keep building the story.
cta.sub: Book a session, invite him to cover a game or event, or follow along as DJR Photography grows from a dream into a body of work.

services.title: Photography With a Point of View

items.summary: Portraits of the process: practice, focus, and the confidence that grows with every shot.
items.serviceDescription: A visual story about the work behind the camera: the practice, patience, equipment, and confidence that shape David's point of view.

packageDetails: A gallery built around practice, focus, and growth
